elections.title: National Student Council Demo
elections.description: Demo election for student body president.

candidates.name: Ramesh Sharma
candidates.manifesto: Focus on infrastructure, digital economy, and national security.

candidates.name: Priya Singh
candidates.manifesto: Empowering rural development, education, and healthcare.

candidates.name: Arvind Kumar
candidates.manifesto: Free electricity, water, and improved public schools.

candidates.name: Anil Desai
candidates.manifesto: Rooting out corruption and promoting local industries.

candidates.name: Meera Reddy
candidates.manifesto: Better representation for southern states and tech hubs.

candidates.name: Sanjay Patil
candidates.manifesto: State pride, local employment, and agricultural reforms.

candidates.name: Amit Deshmukh
candidates.manifesto: Industrial growth and social welfare schemes.

candidates.name: Rajeev Joshi
candidates.manifesto: Putting Maharashtra first in all state policies.

candidates.name: Neha Gupta
candidates.manifesto: Better cafeteria food and extended library hours.

candidates.name: Rahul Verma
candidates.manifesto: Free Wi-Fi on campus and more tech events.

candidates.name: Vikram Shah
candidates.manifesto: More funding for college sports and annual fests.
